questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Two different positions of the same dice are shown. Select the number that will be on the face opposite to the one showing ' $\mathbf{3}$ '.
questions.solution:
As, '1' is common face in both the dice, keeping it constant and then moving in clockwise direction, we get the faces opposite to each other:
1 2 6
1 5 3
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Study the two different positions of a dice. When the face containing one dot is at bottom then how many dots would be there on the top face?
questions.solution: When both 2 and 3 dots are at the same side, 1 dot should be opposite to 4 dot.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Two different positions of the same dice are shown. Select the letter that will be on the face opposite to the one showing ' 2 '.
questions.solution: As 5 is adjacent to $1,6,2$ and 3 , it is opposite to 4 .
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Two positions of a dice are shown below. When 3 is at the bottom, what number will be at the top? Question Figures :
questions.solution: From the two views of the dice it is clear that number 4 will be at the top when 3 is at the bottom.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.solution: When both 6 and 4 are in the same position of cube, 5 should be opposite to 1 .

questions.q: Choose the alternative that best resembles the unfolded form of the given cube.
questions.solution: In options other than b, two opposite faces appear together. So, the cubes cannot be formed. In option 'b', no two opposite faces appear together. So, the cube can be formed.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Observe the faces of the dice and then answer the question.
Which number is on the face opposite to 4 ?
questions.solution:
The numbers 1, 2, 4 and 6 are on the adjacent faces of number 5 .
Therefore, number 3 will lie opposite 5.
The numbers 2, 5 and 6 are on the adjacent faces of number 1 . Therefore, 4 lies opposite 1.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Two positions of a dice are shown below :
When 3 is at the bottom, which number is at the top?
questions.solution:
1 lies opposite 5.
2 lies opposite 3.
4 lies opposite 6.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Two positions of a dice are shown below:
When ' 2 ' is at the bottom, what number will be at the top ?
questions.solution: When ' 2 ' is at the bottom, number '1' will be on the top.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: How many dots are there on the face opposite the face with two dots?
questions.solution:
There are 2, 3, 4 and 6 dots respectively on the adjacent faces of the face having 5 dots. Therefore, the face with one dot will be opposite the face having 5 dots.
There are 1, 3, and 5 dots respectively on the adjacent faces of the face having two dots. Therefore, either 4 or 6 dots will be on the face opposite of the face having two dots. Now, 4 and 6 dots cannot be on the opposite faces. Clearly, 6 dots are there on the face opposite to the face with two dots.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.q: Four positions of a dice are given in the question figures. Identify the number at the bottom when top's is 6.
questions.solution: From the given views of dice it is clear that the numbers $2,3,4$, and 5 cannot be on the face opposite 1. Hence, 6 must be on face opposite 1. Therefore, when 6 is on the top face 1 must be on the bottom face.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.q: Observe the faces of the dice and answer the question. Which colour is opposite to Red?
questions.solution: Blue, Pink, Yellow and Green colours are on the faces adjacent to Red. Therefore, Black colour is opposite to Red.

questions.q:
Position of Dices is given below :
Identify the number when top is 5 what will be at bottom?
questions.solution:
The numbers 1, 2, 4 and 5 lie on the faces adjacent to 3 .
Therefore, the number 6 lies opposite 3.
The numbers 3, 4, 5 and 6 lie on the faces adjacent to 1 .
Therefore, the number 2 lies opposite 1.
Now, the number 4 lies opposite 5.

questions.solution: \(*\) lies opposite \(\large \circ\). □ lies opposite ⊠. \(\uparrow\) lies opposite \(\Delta\).

questions.q: Study the following figures and find out the number opposite to 2 .
questions.solution:
The numbers 2, 4, 5 and 6 are on adjacent faces of the number 3. Therefore, number 1 lies opposite to 3 .

Now, the number 5 lies opposite to 2.

questions.q: Three positions of a dice are given below. Identify the number on the face opposite to 6 .
questions.solution:
The numbers 2, 4, 5 and 6 cannot be on the face opposite to 3 .

The numbers 1, 3, 4 and 6 cannot be on the face opposite to 5 .
Therefore, 2 lies opposite 5.
Clearly, 4 lies opposite 6.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
